## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Links

- Closes #
- Change pack: `changes/<issue-id>-slug/` or `N/A`
- ADR / research: `N/A`

## Verification

- [ ] tests updated for behavior changes
- [ ] build / test commands listed below

```text
paste commands and key results
```

## Durable Knowledge Promotion

- [ ] ADR updated if the decision is long-lived
- [ ] runbook updated if operating procedure changed
- [ ] research note updated if dated findings should be kept
- [ ] code comments / docstrings updated where boundary knowledge belongs

## Change Pack Retirement

- [ ] no change pack was used
- [ ] active change pack is removed in the final PR for this work
